title: InviteDescribeData
description:
`invite <email>...` (bare, no `--yes`) — the describe: who gets invited, the optional
first-destination hint, and the mailed-link note. **INFERRED.**

channel.description: The first-destination CHANNEL hint the invitation would carry.

seat.description: The emails that would be seated (canonical form).

skill.description: The first-destination SKILL hint the invitation would carry (at most one of skill/channel).
